title: CROSSINGS - 211info
text: ROGUE RETREAT CROSSINGS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Urban campground with a 150-bed capacity. The facility operates through three distinct phases: tents, non-congregate shelter, and a village. In Phase 1, residents are provided tent sites and meals. The focus here is on addressing urgent needs. Participants may not use drugs or alcohol on-site but there are no sobriety requirements for participants to receive services. Phase 2 transitions residents to non-congregate shelters, offering more privacy and security. Residents have access to Pallet Shelters and Rigid Tents which have electrical outlets, heating and cooling, and a locking door. There is a shower and laundry trailer. Residents in this phase are required to participate in case managment services. They also pay a monthly fee and are responsible for their own meals. Phase 3 involves moving into a village setting, where residents live in small, individual units and are required to have 30 days clean and sober. The village environment encourages community building and peer support. 711 E Main Street Suite 25 Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Individuals and couples age 18 and older experiencing homelessness Hours: Apply in person or call: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Shelter: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 499-0880 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 499-0880 Main phone Main phone (541) 499-0880 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit the website and review the housing options availble, then apply in person, by mail, or online. Must call once a month to check on application status and stay active on the shelter waitlist. FEES: Residents in Phase 2 and 3 pay monthly program and utility fees based on a percentage of their income DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the corner of East Main St and Genessee St in Medford, OR. Gray/blue two-story building. Services: Urban Campsites Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - APARTMENTS HOUSING/SHELTER - HAVENS HOUSING/SHELTER - HOPE VILLAGE HOUSING/SHELTER - KELLY SHELTER HOUSING/SHELTER - REDWOOD INN If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROGUE RETREAT
